pass_summaries.summary: Rebuilt the summit chapter around clear on-page causality and sharper scene pressure: Anya now makes the costly relay triage choice, Damian's exposure happens live on the floor, Loid's warning to Yor is explicit, Yor's terrace violence commits to clear deaths, and the local continuity and recurrence defects were corrected.
